Tests using YAML-LD JSON Profile

These tests implement the requirements for the YAML-LD JSON Profile.

This is an HTML version of a test manifest. The JSON-LD version of this manifest may be found at manifest.jsonld.jsonld. The manifest vocabulary is described in the JSON-LD Test Vocabulary ( JSON-LD, Turtle ) and is based on the RDF Test Vocabulary.

The YAML-LD Test Suite is a set of tests that can be used to verify YAML-LD Processor conformance to the set of specifications that constitute YAML-LD. The goal of the suite is to provide an easy and comprehensive YAML-LD testing solution for developers creating YAML-LD Processors.

General instructions for running the YAML-LD Test suite

Described in the README.

Contributing Tests

If you would like to contribute a new test or a fix to an existing test, please follow these steps:

  1. Notify the JSON-LD Community Group that you will be creating a new test or fix and the purpose of the change by creating an issue on the GitHub Repository, or by sending a message to the group mailing list, public-linked-json@w3.org.
  2. Clone the git repository: git://github.com/w3c/json-ld-api.git .
  3. Make your changes on a separate branch and submit them via a GitHub Pull Request, or via a 'git format-patch' to the JSON-LD Community Group mailing list .

Distribution

Distributed under the W3C Test Suite License . To contribute to a W3C Test Suite, see the policies and contribution forms .

Disclaimer

UNDER THE EXCLUSIVE LICENSE, THIS DOCUMENT AND ALL DOCUMENTS, TESTS AND SOFTWARE THAT LINK THIS STATEMENT ARE PROVIDED "AS IS," AND COPYRIGHT HOLDERS MAKE NO REPRESENTATIONS OR WARRANTIES, EXPRESS OR IMPLIED, INCLUDING, BUT NOT LIMITED TO, WARRANTIES OF MERCHANTABILITY, FITNESS FOR A PARTICULAR PURPOSE, NON-INFRINGEMENT, OR TITLE; THAT THE CONTENTS OF THE DOCUMENT ARE SUITABLE FOR ANY PURPOSE; NOR THAT THE IMPLEMENTATION OF SUCH CONTENTS WILL NOT INFRINGE ANY THIRD PARTY PATENTS, COPYRIGHTS, TRADEMARKS OR OTHER RIGHTS.

COPYRIGHT HOLDERS WILL NOT BE LIABLE FOR ANY DIRECT, INDIRECT, SPECIAL OR CONSEQUENTIAL DAMAGES ARISING OUT OF ANY USE OF THE DOCUMENT OR THE PERFORMANCE OR IMPLEMENTATION OF THE CONTENTS THEREOF.

Test Definitions

baseIri
https://w3c.github.io/yaml-ld/tests/
Test cir-document-content-1-negative Document with scalar content.
ID
#cir-document-content-1-negative
Type
jld:NegativeEvaluationTest,jld:ExpandTest
Name
Document with scalar content.
Purpose
Document content MUST be sequence or mapping.
Input
cases/cir-document-content-1-negative-in.yamlld
References
(1)
Requirement
must
Expect Error Code
loading document failed
Test cir-mapping-key-1-negative Mapping with integer key.
ID
#cir-mapping-key-1-negative
Type
jld:NegativeEvaluationTest,jld:ExpandTest
Name
Mapping with integer key.
Purpose
A mapping key MUST be a string.
Input
cases/mapping-key-must-be-string/integer.yamlld
References
(1) (2)
Requirement
must
Expect Error Code
mapping-key-error
Test cir-mapping-key-2-negative Mapping with an object key.
ID
#cir-mapping-key-2-negative
Type
jld:NegativeEvaluationTest,jld:ExpandTest
Name
Mapping with an object key.
Purpose
A mapping key MUST be a string.
Input
cases/mapping-key-must-be-string/object.yamlld
References
(1)
Requirement
must
Expect Error Code
mapping-key-error
Test cir-mapping-key-3-negative Mapping with a list key.
ID
#cir-mapping-key-3-negative
Type
jld:NegativeEvaluationTest,jld:ExpandTest
Name
Mapping with a list key.
Purpose
A mapping key MUST be a string.
Input
cases/mapping-key-must-be-string/list.yamlld
References
(1)
Requirement
must
Expect Error Code
mapping-key-error
Test cir-mapping-key-4-negative Mapping with a float key.
ID
#cir-mapping-key-4-negative
Type
jld:NegativeEvaluationTest,jld:ExpandTest
Name
Mapping with a float key.
Purpose
A mapping key MUST be a string.
Input
cases/mapping-key-must-be-string/float.yamlld
References
(1)
Requirement
must
Expect Error Code
mapping-key-error
Test cir-mapping-key-5-negative Mapping with a null key.
ID
#cir-mapping-key-5-negative
Type
jld:NegativeEvaluationTest,jld:ExpandTest
Name
Mapping with a null key.
Purpose
A mapping key MUST be a string.
Input
cases/mapping-key-must-be-string/null.yamlld
References
(1)
Requirement
must
Expect Error Code
mapping-key-error
Test cir-scalar-core-1-positive tag:yaml.org.2002 scalars
ID
#cir-scalar-core-1-positive
Type
jld:PositiveEvaluationTest,jld:ExpandTest
Name
tag:yaml.org.2002 scalars
Purpose
Otherwise, the conversion result is mapped through the YAML Core Schema.
Input
cases/cir-scalar-core-1-positive-in.yamlld
References
(1) (2)
Requirement
must
Expect
cases/cir-scalar-core-1-positive-out.yamlld
Options
extendedYAML
true
normative
false
Test cir-scalar-i18n-1-positive language-tagged string with i18n (ignored without extendedYAML)
ID
#cir-scalar-i18n-1-positive
Type
jld:PositiveEvaluationTest,jld:ExpandTest
Name
language-tagged string with i18n (ignored without extendedYAML)
Purpose
Otherwise, the conversion result is mapped through the YAML Core Schema.
Input
cases/cir-scalar-i18n-1-positive-in.yamlld
References
(1)
Requirement
must
Expect
cases/cir-scalar-i18n-1-positive-out.yamlld
Options
extendedYAML
true
normative
false
Test cir-scalar-other-1-positive Scalars with other node tags (ignored without extendedYAML)
ID
#cir-scalar-other-1-positive
Type
jld:PositiveEvaluationTest,jld:ExpandTest
Name
Scalars with other node tags (ignored without extendedYAML)
Purpose
Otherwise, the conversion result is mapped through the YAML Core Schema.
Input
cases/cir-scalar-other-1-positive-in.yamlld
References
(1) (2)
Requirement
must
Expect
cases/cir-scalar-other-1-positive-out.yamlld
Options
extendedYAML
true
normative
false
Test cr-comments-1-positive Various comment forms
ID
#cr-comments-1-positive
Type
jld:PositiveEvaluationTest,jld:ExpandTest
Name
Various comment forms
Purpose
Comments are white space.
Input
cases/cr-comments-1-positive-in.yamlld
References
(1)
Requirement
must
Expect
cases/cr-comments-1-positive-out.yamlld
Test cr-utf8-1-positive UTF-8 BOM
ID
#cr-utf8-1-positive
Type
jld:PositiveEvaluationTest,jld:ExpandTest
Name
UTF-8 BOM
Purpose
A YAML-LD document MUST be encoded in UTF-8, to ensure interoperability with [[JSON]].
Input
cases/cr-utf8-1-positive-in.yamlld
References
(1) (2) (3)
Requirement
must
Expect
cases/cr-utf8-1-positive-out.yamlld
Test cr-utf8-2-negative UTF-16 BOM
ID
#cr-utf8-2-negative
Type
jld:NegativeEvaluationTest,jld:ExpandTest
Name
UTF-16 BOM
Purpose
A YAML-LD document MUST be encoded in UTF-8, to ensure interoperability with [[JSON]].
Input
cases/cr-utf8-2-negative-in.yamlld
References
(1) (2) (3) (4) (5) (6)
Requirement
must
Expect Error Code
invalid encoding
Test cr-well-formed-1-positive Load a well-formed document
ID
#cr-well-formed-1-positive
Type
jld:PositiveEvaluationTest,jld:ExpandTest
Name
Load a well-formed document
Purpose
All YAML-LD streams MUST form a well-formed stream.
Input
cases/cr-well-formed-1-positive-in.yamlld
References
(1) (2)
Requirement
must
Expect
cases/cr-well-formed-1-positive-out.yamlld
Test cr-well-formed-2-negative Fail to load a non-well-formed stream
ID
#cr-well-formed-2-negative
Type
jld:NegativeEvaluationTest,jld:ExpandTest
Name
Fail to load a non-well-formed stream
Purpose
All YAML-LD streams MUST form a well-formed stream.
Input
cases/cr-well-formed-2-negative-in.yamlld
References
(1) (2) (3) (4) (5)
Requirement
must
Expect Error Code
loading document failed
Test aa-cycles-1-positive Use of anchors and aliases
ID
#aa-cycles-1-positive
Type
jld:PositiveEvaluationTest,jld:ExpandTest
Name
Use of anchors and aliases
Purpose
A YAML-LD document MAY contain anchored nodes and alias nodes.
Input
cases/aa-cycles-1-positive-in.yamlld
References
(1) (2) (3)
Requirement
may
Expect
cases/aa-cycles-1-positive-out.yamlld
Test aa-cycles-2-negative Anchors and aliases with cycles
ID
#aa-cycles-2-negative
Type
jld:NegativeEvaluationTest,jld:ExpandTest
Name
Anchors and aliases with cycles
Purpose
A YAML-LD document ... MUST NOT contain cycles.
Input
cases/aa-cycles-2-negative-in.yamlld
References
(1) (2) (3) (4) (5)
Requirement
must
Expect Error Code
loading document failed
Test aa-cycles-3-positive Alias node resolution
ID
#aa-cycles-3-positive
Type
jld:PositiveEvaluationTest,jld:ExpandTest
Name
Alias node resolution
Purpose
Alias nodes MUST be resolved by value to their target nodes.
Input
cases/aa-cycles-3-positive-in.yamlld
References
(1) (2)
Requirement
must
Expect
cases/aa-cycles-3-positive-out.yamlld
Test aa-information-1-positive Anchor names do not convey semantic information
ID
#aa-information-1-positive
Type
jld:PositiveEvaluationTest,jld:ToRDFTest
Name
Anchor names do not convey semantic information
Purpose
Anchor names are a serialization detail and MUST NOT be used to convey relevant information.
Input
cases/aa-information-1-positive-in.yamlld
References
(1)
Requirement
must
Expect
cases/aa-information-1-positive-out.nq
Test cir-scalar-core-2-positive tag:yaml.org.2002 scalars (RDF)
ID
#cir-scalar-core-2-positive
Type
jld:PositiveEvaluationTest,jld:ToRDFTest
Name
tag:yaml.org.2002 scalars (RDF)
Purpose
If t resolves with a prefix of tag:yaml.org.2002:, the conversion result is mapped through the YAML Core Schema.
Input
cases/cir-scalar-core-2-positive-in.yamlld
References
(1)
Requirement
must
Expect
cases/cir-scalar-core-2-positive-out.nq
Options
extendedYAML
true
normative
false
Test cir-scalar-other-2-positive Scalars with other node tags (RDF) (ignored without extendedYAML)
ID
#cir-scalar-other-2-positive
Type
jld:PositiveEvaluationTest,jld:ToRDFTest
Name
Scalars with other node tags (RDF) (ignored without extendedYAML)
Purpose
Otherwise, the conversion result is an RDF literal.
Input
cases/cir-scalar-other-2-positive-in.yamlld
References
(1)
Requirement
may
Expect
cases/cir-scalar-other-2-positive-out.nq
Options
extendedYAML
true
normative
false
Test cr-well-formed-3-negative Undefined alias
ID
#cr-well-formed-3-negative
Type
jld:NegativeEvaluationTest,jld:ExpandTest
Name
Undefined alias
Purpose
All document MUST use node aliases defined by a previous node.
Input
cases/cr-well-formed-3-negative-in.yamlld
References
(1) (2) (3) (4)
Requirement
must
Expect Error Code
loading document failed
Test html-and-yaml-streams YAML Stream with multiple documents embedded into HTML.
ID
#html-and-yaml-streams
Type
jld:PositiveEvaluationTest,jld:ExpandTest
Name
YAML Stream with multiple documents embedded into HTML.
Purpose
Input
cases/html/stream.html
References
(1)
Requirement
must
Expect
cases/html/stream.yamlld
Options
extractAllScripts
true
Test html-dedent-needed YAML Stream with multiple documents embedded into HTML.
ID
#html-dedent-needed
Type
jld:PositiveEvaluationTest,jld:ExpandTest
Name
YAML Stream with multiple documents embedded into HTML.
Purpose
Input
cases/html/dedent-needed.html
References
(1)
Requirement
must
Expect
cases/html/stream.yamlld
Options
extractAllScripts
true
Test html-dedent-not-needed YAML Stream with multiple documents embedded into HTML.
ID
#html-dedent-not-needed
Type
jld:PositiveEvaluationTest,jld:ExpandTest
Name
YAML Stream with multiple documents embedded into HTML.
Purpose
Input
cases/html/dedent-not-needed.html
References
(1)
Requirement
must
Expect
cases/html/stream.yamlld
Options
extractAllScripts
true
Test two-documents-from-stream YAML Stream with multiple documents.
ID
#two-documents-from-stream
Type
jld:PositiveEvaluationTest,jld:ExpandTest
Name
YAML Stream with multiple documents.
Purpose
Input
cases/streams/two-documents-in.yamlld
References
(1)
Requirement
must
Expect
cases/streams/two-documents-out.yamlld
Options
extractAllScripts
true
Test one-document-from-stream YAML Stream with multiple documents.
ID
#one-document-from-stream
Type
jld:PositiveEvaluationTest,jld:ExpandTest
Name
YAML Stream with multiple documents.
Purpose
Input
cases/streams/two-documents-in.yamlld
References
(1)
Requirement
must
Expect
cases/streams/one-document-out.yamlld
Options
extractAllScripts
false
Test core-bool-true Lowercase true is a boolean
ID
#core-bool-true
Type
jld:PositiveEvaluationTest,jld:ExpandTest
Name
Lowercase true is a boolean
Purpose
YAML Core Schema resolves true as boolean.
Input
cases/yaml-schema/bool-true-in.yamlld
References
(1)
Requirement
must
Expect
cases/yaml-schema/bool-true-out.yamlld
Test core-bool-false Lowercase false is a boolean
ID
#core-bool-false
Type
jld:PositiveEvaluationTest,jld:ExpandTest
Name
Lowercase false is a boolean
Purpose
YAML Core Schema resolves false as boolean.
Input
cases/yaml-schema/bool-false-in.yamlld
References
(1)
Requirement
must
Expect
cases/yaml-schema/bool-false-out.yamlld
Test core-bool-true-title Title-case True is a boolean
ID
#core-bool-true-title
Type
jld:PositiveEvaluationTest,jld:ExpandTest
Name
Title-case True is a boolean
Purpose
YAML Core Schema resolves True as boolean true.
Input
cases/yaml-schema/bool-true-title-in.yamlld
References
(1)
Requirement
must
Expect
cases/yaml-schema/bool-true-out.yamlld
Test core-bool-false-upper Uppercase FALSE is a boolean
ID
#core-bool-false-upper
Type
jld:PositiveEvaluationTest,jld:ExpandTest
Name
Uppercase FALSE is a boolean
Purpose
YAML Core Schema resolves FALSE as boolean false.
Input
cases/yaml-schema/bool-false-upper-in.yamlld
References
(1)
Requirement
must
Expect
cases/yaml-schema/bool-false-out.yamlld
Test core-null-null null is null
ID
#core-null-null
Type
jld:PositiveEvaluationTest,jld:ExpandTest
Name
null is null
Purpose
YAML Core Schema resolves null as null.
Input
cases/yaml-schema/null-null-in.yamlld
References
(1)
Requirement
must
Expect
cases/yaml-schema/null-null-out.yamlld
Test core-null-tilde Tilde ~ is null
ID
#core-null-tilde
Type
jld:PositiveEvaluationTest,jld:ExpandTest
Name
Tilde ~ is null
Purpose
YAML Core Schema resolves ~ as null.
Input
cases/yaml-schema/null-tilde-in.yamlld
References
(1)
Requirement
must
Expect
cases/yaml-schema/null-null-out.yamlld
Test core-null-upper Uppercase NULL is null
ID
#core-null-upper
Type
jld:PositiveEvaluationTest,jld:ExpandTest
Name
Uppercase NULL is null
Purpose
YAML Core Schema resolves NULL as null.
Input
cases/yaml-schema/null-upper-in.yamlld
References
(1)
Requirement
must
Expect
cases/yaml-schema/null-null-out.yamlld
Test core-int-decimal Decimal integer
ID
#core-int-decimal
Type
jld:PositiveEvaluationTest,jld:ExpandTest
Name
Decimal integer
Purpose
YAML Core Schema resolves decimal integers.
Input
cases/yaml-schema/int-decimal-in.yamlld
References
(1)
Requirement
must
Expect
cases/yaml-schema/int-decimal-out.yamlld
Test core-int-octal Octal integer
ID
#core-int-octal
Type
jld:PositiveEvaluationTest,jld:ExpandTest
Name
Octal integer
Purpose
YAML Core Schema resolves 0o77 as integer 63.
Input
cases/yaml-schema/int-octal-in.yamlld
References
(1)
Requirement
must
Expect
cases/yaml-schema/int-octal-out.yamlld
Test core-int-hex Hex integer
ID
#core-int-hex
Type
jld:PositiveEvaluationTest,jld:ExpandTest
Name
Hex integer
Purpose
YAML Core Schema resolves 0x3A as integer 58.
Input
cases/yaml-schema/int-hex-in.yamlld
References
(1)
Requirement
must
Expect
cases/yaml-schema/int-hex-out.yamlld
Test core-float-basic Basic float
ID
#core-float-basic
Type
jld:PositiveEvaluationTest,jld:ExpandTest
Name
Basic float
Purpose
YAML Core Schema resolves decimal floats.
Input
cases/yaml-schema/float-basic-in.yamlld
References
(1)
Requirement
must
Expect
cases/yaml-schema/float-basic-out.yamlld
Test core-float-scientific Scientific notation float
ID
#core-float-scientific
Type
jld:PositiveEvaluationTest,jld:ExpandTest
Name
Scientific notation float
Purpose
YAML Core Schema resolves scientific notation floats.
Input
cases/yaml-schema/float-scientific-in.yamlld
References
(1)
Requirement
must
Expect
cases/yaml-schema/float-scientific-out.yamlld
Test core-date-ymd Date-like scalar YYYY-MM-DD is a string
ID
#core-date-ymd
Type
jld:PositiveEvaluationTest,jld:ExpandTest
Name
Date-like scalar YYYY-MM-DD is a string
Purpose
YAML 1.2 Core Schema has no timestamp type; 2018-04-01 resolves to a plain string. Some YAML libraries may wish to parse this as a native date object, this should not happen.
Input
cases/yaml-schema/date-ymd-in.yamlld
References
(1)
Requirement
must
Expect
cases/yaml-schema/date-ymd-out.yamlld
Test core-float-inf-negative Infinity scalar causes error
ID
#core-float-inf-negative
Type
jld:NegativeEvaluationTest,jld:ExpandTest
Name
Infinity scalar causes error
Purpose
Float infinity (.inf) cannot be represented in JSON and MUST cause loading document failed.
Input
cases/yaml-schema/float-inf-in.yamlld
References
(1)
Requirement
must
Expect Error Code
loading document failed
Test core-float-neg-inf-negative Negative infinity scalar causes error
ID
#core-float-neg-inf-negative
Type
jld:NegativeEvaluationTest,jld:ExpandTest
Name
Negative infinity scalar causes error
Purpose
Float negative infinity (-.inf) cannot be represented in JSON and MUST cause loading document failed.
Input
cases/yaml-schema/float-neg-inf-in.yamlld
References
(1)
Requirement
must
Expect Error Code
loading document failed
Test core-float-plus-inf-negative Plus infinity scalar causes error
ID
#core-float-plus-inf-negative
Type
jld:NegativeEvaluationTest,jld:ExpandTest
Name
Plus infinity scalar causes error
Purpose
Float plus infinity (+.inf) cannot be represented in JSON and MUST cause loading document failed.
Input
cases/yaml-schema/float-plus-inf-in.yamlld
References
(1)
Requirement
must
Expect Error Code
loading document failed
Test core-float-nan-negative NaN scalar causes error
ID
#core-float-nan-negative
Type
jld:NegativeEvaluationTest,jld:ExpandTest
Name
NaN scalar causes error
Purpose
Float NaN (.nan) cannot be represented in JSON and MUST cause loading document failed.
Input
cases/yaml-schema/float-nan-in.yamlld
References
(1)
Requirement
must
Expect Error Code
loading document failed
Test core-float-nan-mixed-negative NaN scalar (.NaN) causes error
ID
#core-float-nan-mixed-negative
Type
jld:NegativeEvaluationTest,jld:ExpandTest
Name
NaN scalar (.NaN) causes error
Purpose
Float NaN (.NaN) cannot be represented in JSON and MUST cause loading document failed.
Input
cases/yaml-schema/float-nan-mixed-in.yamlld
References
(1)
Requirement
must
Expect Error Code
loading document failed
Test core-float-nan-upper-negative NaN scalar (.NAN) causes error
ID
#core-float-nan-upper-negative
Type
jld:NegativeEvaluationTest,jld:ExpandTest
Name
NaN scalar (.NAN) causes error
Purpose
Float NaN (.NAN) cannot be represented in JSON and MUST cause loading document failed.
Input
cases/yaml-schema/float-nan-upper-in.yamlld
References
(1)
Requirement
must
Expect Error Code
loading document failed
Test core-yaml11-yes YAML 1.1 'yes' is a string
ID
#core-yaml11-yes
Type
jld:PositiveEvaluationTest,jld:ExpandTest
Name
YAML 1.1 'yes' is a string
Purpose
YAML 1.2 Core Schema does not recognize yes as boolean; it is a plain string.
Input
cases/yaml-schema/yaml11-yes-in.yamlld
References
(1)
Requirement
must
Expect
cases/yaml-schema/yaml11-yes-out.yamlld
Test core-yaml11-no YAML 1.1 'no' is a string
ID
#core-yaml11-no
Type
jld:PositiveEvaluationTest,jld:ExpandTest
Name
YAML 1.1 'no' is a string
Purpose
YAML 1.2 Core Schema does not recognize no as boolean; it is a plain string.
Input
cases/yaml-schema/yaml11-no-in.yamlld
References
(1)
Requirement
must
Expect
cases/yaml-schema/yaml11-no-out.yamlld
Test core-yaml11-on YAML 1.1 'on' is a string
ID
#core-yaml11-on
Type
jld:PositiveEvaluationTest,jld:ExpandTest
Name
YAML 1.1 'on' is a string
Purpose
YAML 1.2 Core Schema does not recognize on as boolean; it is a plain string.
Input
cases/yaml-schema/yaml11-on-in.yamlld
References
(1)
Requirement
must
Expect
cases/yaml-schema/yaml11-on-out.yamlld
Test core-yaml11-off YAML 1.1 'off' is a string
ID
#core-yaml11-off
Type
jld:PositiveEvaluationTest,jld:ExpandTest
Name
YAML 1.1 'off' is a string
Purpose
YAML 1.2 Core Schema does not recognize off as boolean; it is a plain string.
Input
cases/yaml-schema/yaml11-off-in.yamlld
References
(1)
Requirement
must
Expect
cases/yaml-schema/yaml11-off-out.yamlld
Test core-yaml11-yes-title YAML 1.1 'Yes' is a string
ID
#core-yaml11-yes-title
Type
jld:PositiveEvaluationTest,jld:ExpandTest
Name
YAML 1.1 'Yes' is a string
Purpose
YAML 1.2 Core Schema does not recognize Yes as boolean; it is a plain string.
Input
cases/yaml-schema/yaml11-yes-title-in.yamlld
References
(1)
Requirement
must
Expect
cases/yaml-schema/yaml11-yes-title-out.yamlld
Test core-yaml11-yes-upper YAML 1.1 'YES' is a string
ID
#core-yaml11-yes-upper
Type
jld:PositiveEvaluationTest,jld:ExpandTest
Name
YAML 1.1 'YES' is a string
Purpose
YAML 1.2 Core Schema does not recognize YES as boolean; it is a plain string.
Input
cases/yaml-schema/yaml11-yes-upper-in.yamlld
References
(1)
Requirement
must
Expect
cases/yaml-schema/yaml11-yes-upper-out.yamlld
